productDisplayName: Peter England Men Printed Green TShirt
description: Composition Green T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry falt in shade Warm iron Hate doing the same thing over and over again? Chuck that boredom out of your life and slip into this peter england Oddies collection to express the ordinary in style.
